title: _data/elsewhere.yml — links on /elsewhere/
description: External profiles and pages that feature the site owner.

profiles.description: Canonical academic / identity profiles (rendered as pill links).

featured.description: Pages that feature or mention the owner (rendered as cards).

source.description: Who hosts the page, e.g. "University of Urbino".

note.description: One line on what it says.

proceedings.description: Co-edited workshop proceedings (rendered as pill links).
